responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix IVX app startup reliability (black screen, infinite loading, crash) and fix automatic owner sign-in on cold launch so the login screen appears every time, then build and ship APKs proving both fixes

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved — no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project, no replacement shell
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app` (NOT `com.rork.ivxholdings` — that Kotlin app is frozen)
- Use `bun x` / `bunx` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Never ask user for credentials — find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports — redact all tokens/keys
- Owner email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID are NOT set in sandbox — EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Diagnostic banner must be hidden by default in ALL runtimes, available only through Owner Control → Diagnostics
- Owner AI send button must be disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER` auth state
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture — modify the EXISTING codebase only
- **User demanded**: "remove nothing from this project from now rork is a paying developer can't told what direction I want to go" — never remove anything from the project, never tell user what direction to go
- **User demanded (build 20)**: STOP all other development. Do not modify owner login again until the application can render the first route reliably. Root navigator must render without waiting for network-dependent work. Never return null from root layout after splash hidden. Never leave root layout without a rendered screen.
- Startup requirements: root navigator renders without waiting for network, local auth state initializes with strict timeout, Supabase/Render/APIs must NOT block initial route, failed init shows Owner Login with diagnostic message (not black screen), retry executes real bounded initialization
- Startup trace checkpoints required: APP_MOUNTED, ROOT_LAYOUT_RENDERED, PROVIDERS_MOUNTED, SPLASH_HIDE_STARTED, SPLASH_HIDE_COMPLETED, AUTH_INIT_STARTED, AUTH_INIT_COMPLETED, AUTH_INIT_FAILED, ROUTER_READY, INITIAL_ROUTE_RENDERED — all with elapsed ms
- APK download link MUST be a direct `.apk` file (application/octet-stream), NOT an HTML landing page
- Production APK must NOT depend on Metro, localhost, 127.0.0.1, 10.0.2.2, ngrok, or tunnel URLs

## Progress
### Done
- Build 16 auth context fixes (still present):
  - `initAuth()` calls `supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' })` on cold launch, sets `manualOwnerLoginRef.current = false`
  - `onAuthStateChange` gated by `manualOwnerLoginRef` — ignores all session events unless manual login occurred
  - `manualOwnerLoginRef` set unconditionally in `login()`, `loginOwnerPasswordless()`, `verify2FA()`
- Build 17 router auth guard added to `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`
- Build 18 startup reliability fixes (superseded by build 20):
  - `expo/app/_layout.tsx`: SplashScreen control, 5s startup timeout, try/catch on all startup tasks
  - `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: `initAuth()` wraps signOut in `withTimeout(AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS)`
  - `expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`: 5s `loadingTimedOut` state forces auth guard to proceed
- Build 19 AsyncStorage fixes (still present):
  - `expo/lib/analytics.ts` line 1024: `removeMany` → `Promise.all + removeItem`
  - `expo/lib/api-resilience.ts` line 169: same fix
  - `expo/lib/email-context.tsx` line 225: same fix
  - `@react-native-async-storage/async-storage` downgraded to 2.2.0 for Expo SDK 54
- Build 19 APK completed and uploaded — `https://litter.catbox.moe/tdzujt.apk` (superseded by build 20)
- **User tested build 19 on real Android device — STILL FAILING**: splash → "IVX is taking longer than expected" (~5s) → permanent black screen. Owner Login never renders.
- **Build 20 startup reliability fixes applied**:
  - `expo/app/_layout.tsx`: REMOVED unconditional 5s startup timeout screen. Root layout now ALWAYS renders the Stack (navigation tree). Added `ProviderBoundary` class for per-provider error isolation. Deferred `SplashScreen.hideAsync()` to next frame via `setTimeout(..., 0)`. Added `ProviderMountProbe` to log PROVIDERS_MOUNTED. Added startup trace logging.
  - `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: `initAuth()` now NON-BLOCKING — sets `isLoading=false` in a microtask (`Promise.resolve().then(...)`) BEFORE background signOut completes. signOut runs fire-and-forget with `withTimeout(AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS)`. Router unlocked immediately. Added startup trace logging (AUTH_INIT_STARTED, AUTH_INIT_COMPLETED, AUTH_INIT_FAILED).
  - `expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`: Reduced safety timeout from 5s to 2s (`TABS_LOADING_TIMEOUT_MS = 2000`). Added recoverable error UI with "Open Owner Login" button that performs real `router.replace('/login')`. Added startup trace (ROUTER_READY, INITIAL_ROUTE_RENDERED). Added `errorText` and `retryButton` styles.
  - `expo/app/login.tsx`: Added `logStartup('INITIAL_ROUTE_RENDERED', 'login')` at top of `LoginScreenContent`.
  - `expo/lib/startup-trace.ts`: NEW file — unique trace ID per launch, `logStartup()` and `logStartupError()` with elapsed ms, sanitizes JWTs/hex strings before logging.
  - `expo/metro.config.js`: Made resilient to missing `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk/metro` — wrapped in try/catch, falls back to default Metro config.
  - `expo/app.config.ts`: Bumped to versionCode 20, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_20_STARTUP_RELIABILITY`
- **Build 20 Gradle `assembleRelease` COMPLETED** — BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 5s, 392 tasks, 23 executed, 369 up-to-date. Metro bundle: 3854 modules, 28854ms.
- **Build 20 APK built and uploaded**:
  - File: `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build20.apk`
  - Size: 82,894,894 bytes (~79MB)
  - SHA-256: `67ab9ceeea636d7dd5f23aa55aae0feded0c55638da78800ed3356584ef93294`
  - Download: `https://litter.catbox.moe/stv0a5.apk` (72h expiry)
  - Verified: HTTP 200, `application/octet-stream`, `content-length: 82894894`, `accept-ranges: bytes`
- **Bundle verification (build 20)**:
  - 0 `removeMany` occurrences ✓
  - 1 `IVX-STARTUP` occurrence (trace logging present) ✓
  - 0 `taking longer than expected` occurrences (removed from root layout) ✓
  - Production Supabase URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` present ✓
  - `PRODUCTION_SUPABASE_URL` and `PRODUCTION_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` constants present ✓
  - Development URLs in bundle: localhost (2), 127.0.0.1 (1), 10.0.2.2 (2), 0.0.0.0 (68) — these are in library/framework code strings, NOT runtime config URLs
  - Build marker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_20_STARTUP_RELIABILITY`: 0 matches via strings (binary bundle, marker may be minified)
- `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` updated with full build 20 details including startup audit root causes and fixes
- `.rork/plans/...plan.md` updated with Task 0 — startup reliability checklist (6 of 7 items marked done)
- Watchman neutralized — replaced `/usr/local/bin/watchman` with no-op script
- `rork.json` updated — Expo app registered with `framework: "react-native"`, `path: "expo"`
- node_modules reinstalled in `expo/` via `bun install` (1335 packages)

### In Progress
- User needs to test build 20 APK on real Android device — verify no black screen, Owner Login renders, startup trace shows INITIAL_ROUTE_RENDERED

### Blocked
- EXPO_TOKEN not set — EAS cloud build unavailable
- EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID not set — defaults to placeholder
- GitHub token expired (HTTP 401) — cannot push to GitHub repo, Render backend stuck at `0b37191f`
- Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox — user must test installed APK on physical device
- Android logcat and screenshot of first screen require a physical device or emulator — not available in sandbox
- `createApp` tool rejected `react-native` framework — rork.json was edited manually instead
- `runChecks` tool does not recognize Expo app — only sees `android-ivx-holdings` (kotlin)

## Key Decisions
- **Build 20 root cause #1**: Unconditional 5s startup timeout in `app/_layout.tsx` replaced the entire navigation tree with a non-recovering fallback screen. After 5s the app ALWAYS showed timeout screen, and Retry only reset local state. Fixed by removing timeout entirely — root layout always renders Stack.
- **Build 20 root cause #2**: `initAuth()` blocked the router until `supabase.auth.signOut()` completed or 3.5s `withTimeout` fired. `isLoading` stayed true during that window, keeping TabsLayout on spinner. Fixed by setting `isLoading=false` in a microtask BEFORE signOut completes — router unlocked immediately, signOut runs fire-and-forget.
- **Build 20 root cause #3**: `SplashScreen.hideAsync()` was called immediately in root layout effect, before React tree had painted. Could hide native splash while JS tree was still initializing → black frame. Fixed by deferring to next frame via `setTimeout(..., 0)`.
- **Build 20 root cause #4**: `metro.config.js` required `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk/metro` which doesn't exist as a subpath export. Gradle build failed at `:app:createBundleReleaseJsAndAssets`. Fixed by wrapping require in try/catch with fallback to default config.
- **Build 19 root causes** (superseded): node_modules missing, Watchman crashing, AsyncStorage `removeMany` not in v2.2.0, rork.json missing Expo app entry
- **Download link**: gofile.io serves HTML landing pages. litterbox.catbox.moe serves `application/octet-stream` directly.
- Metro bundle URL must use `node_modules/expo-router/entry.bundle` not `index.bundle` — project has no `index.js`, entry is `expo-router/entry` per `package.json`
- Building APK locally via `expo prebuild` + `gradlew assembleRelease` since EAS cloud is blocked

## Next Steps
1. User installs build 20 APK on real Android device (uninstall old app first, clean install)
2. User captures `adb logcat` filtered for `IVX-STARTUP` to see startup trace checkpoints with elapsed ms
3. User verifies: no black screen, splash transitions to a route, Owner Login appears within seconds, no "taking longer" screen
4. User tests offline launch (Wi-Fi disabled) — should show login or usable offline screen
5. User tests: force-stop + reopen, background/foreground, retry button after simulated error, 10 repeated launches
6. If still failing, the missing startup trace checkpoint will identify exactly where startup stops
7. Once startup is reliable, resume owner-login persistence and diagnostic banner work

## Critical Context
- Git HEAD SHA: `e3149d5c995d8e3d95a205d9d4ce4ae65a0958f3` (`e3149d5`)
- Build 20 APK: versionCode 20, `https://litter.catbox.moe/stv0a5.apk`, SHA-256 `67ab9ceeea636d7dd5f23aa55aae0feded0c55638da78800ed3356584ef93294`, 82,894,894 bytes
- Build 19 APK (superseded): `https://litter.catbox.moe/tdzujt.apk`, SHA-256 `0fce738261a89729971c40153bef3d82e9abe858b4bd13a53fae27672cb2d262` — user tested, FAILED (black screen)
- Build 18 APK (superseded): `https://litter.catbox.moe/iin8jx.apk` — user tested, FAILED
- Metro bundler works in sandbox — Watchman neutralized, node_modules installed, 3854 modules bundle successfully
- `@react-native-async-storage/async-storage` version: 2.2.0 (downgraded from 3.1.1)
- `AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS = 3500` at line 39 of `auth-context.tsx`
- `withTimeout` utility at line 433 of `auth-context.tsx`
- `TABS_LOADING_TIMEOUT_MS = 2000` in `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` (reduced from 5000 in build 20)
- Startup trace ID format: `${timestamp.toString(36)}-${random}` — logged as `[IVX-STARTUP <traceId> +<elapsedMs>ms] <checkpoint> | <detail>`
- Supabase production URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- Supabase production anon key: embedded in `expo/lib/supabase-env.ts` as `PRODUCTION_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` constant
- `rork.json` registers both Expo app (`path: "expo"`, `framework: "react-native"`) and Kotlin app (`path: "android-ivx-holdings"`, `framework: "kotlin"`)
- Gradle 8.14.3, JDK 17.0.13, Kotlin 2.1.20, Android SDK 35/36, build-tools 36.0.0, NDK 27.1.12297006
- User has sent 4 screen recordings/images — app was failing on both Expo Go and APK across builds 18, 19, and 20 (pending test)

## Relevant Files
- `expo/lib/startup-trace.ts`: **NEW (build 20)** — unique trace ID, `logStartup()`, `logStartupError()`, `get
